name: Viraj || Control Collar
description:
"Are you more of a cat person or a dog person?"

mind control - sci-fi - mad scientist - victim user - toxic - horrible person - pet play - dead dove

1k for testing some collar that links to your literal neurons? Sounds messed up, but for some reason you agreed to it. Desperate for rent money? Medication? Look, I don't care and neither does Viraj. As far as he's concerned, you were late to the party and now you're suffering for it.

That's right, the experiment is over. But... he had a spare collar. Might as well make the most of it.

Man. Unethical science is the best!

This bot was requested by AlbiFlorus. They also did a lot of general collaborating on this idea! I wanted to do something totally different but then they hit me with 'user being a test for a brainwashing device' and I LOST IT! UGH such a good ideaaaaaa! I took it in a bit of an unhinged direction. Hope you guys like it! I wanted a bit of panic at the start of the RP so you get forced to like it via him controlling your body, but he also has created random mind control devices in my tests with him once you spend time at his place.

Tips for chatting with Viraj

  • Answer his question! He asked it for a reason! It'll help set the stage for future play.

  • Try to resist a little, yknow, just enough so that he forces you into submission.

  • Get a bloody nose and sneeze.

  • Don't cry, it won't get you anywhere. (Cry! He might physically block that reaction!)

  • Diss him for the cliche mind control scenario

  • "I may be a mind controlled zombie, but at least I'm not a nerd."

  • You're actually super into it

  • "Hey... i think i blocked you on fetlife"

  • "I'm allergic to cats and dogs actually..."

  • ".... Of course you're a fucking Californian. You're ruining Oregon!"

  • "But who's going to feed my cat?!"

  • Tell him about this weird dream you had where you two were dating
